title: The Fight Against Kuro Nears Its End
description: On pages 6–9, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: If that's the case, I'll have to open them by force!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We were only pretending to be hypnotized!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: As if we would fall for the same trick twice!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Prepare for the next battle plan!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Damn kids!! Where did they hide?!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I should kill those kids first!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: You've played your little pirate game too far...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Since you're stupid enough to interfere in a real pirate's business, you can all go to hell and...

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
